Footer.tagline: Strategy-led pricing optimization for B2B SaaS companies ready to unlock trapped revenue.

Common.ctaDescription: Join hundreds of SaaS companies that have already transformed their pricing into a growth engine.

HomePage.title: Your pricing is leaving money on the table.
HomePage.subtitle: PriceLayer helps B2B SaaS companies unlock revenue trapped in their pricing. We design tiers, packaging, and monetization strategies that grow revenue and reduce churn.
HomePage.servicesSubheading: We work alongside your team to design pricing that drives growth. No platform lock-in, no ongoing software fees.

pricingArchitecture.title: Pricing Architecture
pricingArchitecture.description: Design optimal tiers, feature gating, and price points backed by willingness-to-pay research and competitive analysis.

packagingStrategy.title: Packaging Strategy
packagingStrategy.description: Bundle features into packages that drive expansion revenue, reduce decision friction, and align with how customers actually buy.

monetizationAudit.title: Monetization Audit
monetizationAudit.description: Identify revenue leaks in your current model. We analyze your pricing, usage data, and churn patterns to find quick wins.

HomePage.howItWorksSubheading: A proven three-phase process that minimizes risk and maximizes impact.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.description: We audit your current pricing, interview customers, and benchmark against your competitive landscape.

design.title: Design
design.description: We model and test new pricing structures, run simulations, and design packaging that maps to your value metrics.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.description: We help you roll out pricing changes with migration plans, change communication, and churn mitigation strategies.

HomePage.positioningHeading:
You don't need another billing tool.
You need a pricing strategy.
HomePage.positioningDescription: Paddle, Stripe, and Chargebee handle billing infrastructure. But the right infrastructure with the wrong pricing still leaves revenue on the table. PriceLayer is the strategy layer that sits above your billing stack — ensuring every tier, feature gate, and price point is optimized for growth.

sarahChen.quote: PriceLayer helped us restructure our pricing from a flat rate to usage-based tiers. Our expansion revenue increased 34% in the first quarter.
sarahChen.name: Sarah Chen
sarahChen.title: VP of Revenue, DataSync

marcusRivera.quote: We were underpricing our enterprise tier by 40%. PriceLayer's audit paid for itself in the first month.
marcusRivera.name: Marcus Rivera
marcusRivera.title: CEO, CloudQueue

amiraOkafor.quote: The packaging redesign reduced our sales cycle by two weeks. Prospects could self-select the right tier without a demo.
amiraOkafor.name: Amira Okafor
amiraOkafor.title: Head of Growth, FormStack Pro

HomePage.ctaHeadline: Ready to stop guessing on pricing?

AboutPage.title: About PriceLayer
AboutPage.mission: We believe pricing is the most underleveraged growth lever in SaaS. Most companies spend months on product and minutes on pricing. We exist to change that.
AboutPage.approachP1: PriceLayer combines rigorous quantitative research with deep SaaS domain expertise. Every engagement starts with understanding your customers, your competitive landscape, and your growth objectives.
AboutPage.approachP2: We use a combination of competitive benchmarking, willingness-to-pay research, and value metric analysis to design pricing that aligns what you charge with the value your customers actually receive.
AboutPage.approachP3: The result: higher conversion rates, better expansion revenue, lower churn, and a pricing model that scales with your business.

elenaVoss.name: Elena Voss
elenaVoss.title: Founder & Lead Strategist
elenaVoss.bio: Former VP of Pricing at a $500M ARR SaaS company. 12 years of experience in B2B pricing strategy and monetization.

jamesOkonkwo.name: James Okonkwo
jamesOkonkwo.title: Senior Pricing Analyst
jamesOkonkwo.bio: Data scientist turned pricing specialist. Built pricing models for 80+ SaaS companies across fintech, DevTools, and MarTech.

priyaSharma.name: Priya Sharma
priyaSharma.title: Packaging & GTM Lead
priyaSharma.bio: 10 years in product marketing and go-to-market strategy. Expert in tier design, feature gating, and launch communication.

danielKim.name: Daniel Kim
danielKim.title: Research Director
danielKim.bio: PhD in behavioral economics. Leads willingness-to-pay research and conjoint analysis for every client engagement.

evidenceOverIntuition.title: Evidence Over Intuition
evidenceOverIntuition.description: Every recommendation is backed by data — willingness-to-pay research, competitive benchmarking, and usage analytics. We don't guess.

revenueWithoutResentment.title: Revenue Without Resentment
revenueWithoutResentment.description: Good pricing grows revenue and makes customers feel they're getting a fair deal. We optimize for long-term trust, not short-term extraction.

longTermPartnership.title: Long-Term Partnership
longTermPartnership.description: Pricing isn't a one-time project. We build ongoing relationships and return for pricing reviews as your product and market evolve.

ContactPage.title: Let's talk pricing.
ContactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your company and we'll get back to you within one business day.

ContactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your pricing challenge...
ContactPage.responseTimeDescription: We respond within one business day, usually faster.

SignupPage.title: Get started with a free pricing diagnostic.

diagnostic.title: Free Diagnostic Call
diagnostic.description: We review your current pricing model, identify quick wins, and assess the opportunity.

proposal.title: Custom Proposal

transformation.title: Pricing Transformation
transformation.description: We execute the strategy together — from research through design to rollout support.
